checklist.title: 7-Day Sustainable Eating Checklist | Eat Better for the Planet
checklist.metaDesc: Download our free 7-Day Sustainable Eating Checklist and learn simple daily actions to cut your food footprint and shop more sustainably.
checklist.ogDesc: Practical, science-based tips to reduce your food footprint in just 7 days. Download the free printable guide.
checklist.heroTitle: Eat Better for the Planet — One Simple Step Each Day
checklist.heroSubtitle: Download our free 7-Day Sustainable Eating Checklist and start reducing your food footprint with quick, practical actions you can do right now.
checklist.whoIsThisForText: Anyone who wants quick, practical steps to eat healthier and reduce their environmental impact — from busy professionals to families and curious beginners.
howToUseSteps: Try one action per day for 7 days.
Share your progress with #VGChecklist on social media.
benefits: Easy swaps that save money & emissions
checklist.subscribeText: Want more? Subscribe to weekly tips and get deeper guides on shopping smarter and tracking product footprints.
checklist.noSpam: No spam. Just science-based tips to help you reduce your footprint and shop smarter.

days.title: Day 1 — Choose Seasonal Produce
days.body: Lower emissions and enjoy fresher taste by prioritizing seasonal fruits and vegetables.

days.title: Day 2 — Reduce Food Waste with Simple Meal Planning
days.body: Plan your meals and store leftovers properly to cut waste and CO₂.

days.title: Day 3 — Try a Plant-Based Protein Swap
days.body: Replace one meat-based meal with legumes or plant proteins.

days.title: Day 4 — Check Packaging and Recyclability
days.body: Choose products with recyclable or minimal packaging.

days.title: Day 5 — Prefer Local & Low-Transport Foods
days.body: Support local producers and avoid long-distance products.

days.title: Day 6 — Understand Footprint Indicators (CO₂, Water, Land)
days.body: Learn the environmental impact of common foods.

days.title: Day 7 — Build a Weekly Sustainable Shopping Routine
days.body: Create a simple checklist to guide all your grocery choices.
